task_objective: Implement SDH-ludusavi as a Decky Loader plugin backed by pyludusavi.
design_decisions: Use Ludusavi game names as canonical IDs and treat Steam app IDs as optional metadata.
Keep auto-sync disabled by default and restrict the toggle to automatic start/exit behavior.
Expose manual backup and restore even when auto-sync is disabled, subject to selected game status and a global operation lock.
Keep automatic start restore conservative because pyludusavi exposes change categories but not a definitive local-vs-backup recency proof.
results: Added backend service and pyludusavi adapter.
Replaced the sample Decky UI with the SDH-ludusavi panel controls.
Renamed Python, package, plugin, README, tests, and cache metadata to SDH-ludusavi.
Added durable plan and sync spec documentation.
Validated backend tests, type checking, formatting, linting, and frontend Rollup build.
